query: ALTER TABLE `stores` CHANGE COLUMN `username` `phoneNumber` varchar(10) NOT NULL; ALTER TABLE `stores` DROP INDEX `stores_username_unique`; ALTER TABLE `stores` ADD CONSTRAINT `stores_phoneNumber_unique` UNIQUE(`phoneNumber`);
